item.title: About me
item.description: My name is Joel and I am a Software Developer. I’m currently studying a Computer Science degree at Universitat Oberta de Catalunya; I switched degrees in 2022 (I was previously enrolled at Universitat Rovira i Virgili’s Web and Mobile app development degree; but decided to revamp my career path). My story My passion for computers started early on in my life; thanks to my dad, who introduced me to the fascinating world of PCs, from hardware, to retro or modern software; I have a sweet spot for everything.

item.title: How Emulators Work?
item.description: I, as many more, grew up playing retro videogames on emulators (And the original hardware!): from sprite-based machines, to more complex, 3D-capable monsters. Metal Slug, an impressive 2D game; developed for SNK’s Neo-Geo A few years ago, I started to ask myself how an emulator works; I initially belived it had to be some sort of magic, at the end of the day, code is just that, code. There are no transistors or chips or CPUs you can design with code per se (Well, if we ignore programs like LogiSim exist, of course) … So how do they exactly work?

item.title: 🌐 [0x00] Oblivion
item.description: Difficulty Beginner Points 20 Category Networking Description Com veureu, sembla que el grup d'atacants es diu Oblivion, però de l'executable no sabem res sobre què fa, ni per a què serveix... Comenceu la vostra investigació i descobriu el que pugueu. El que ens interessa és on es connecta, si és que ho fa. Aleshores, el token del joc serà l'adreça IP de destinació... 🇺🇸 As you can see, it looks like the group of attackers is named Oblivion, but we know nothing about the executable file nor what it does.

item.title: 🤖 [0x01] Atacant el Dolent
item.description: Difficulty Medium Points 70 Category Software security Description En els darrers dies s'han rebut tiquets dels nostres clients notificant i reclamant diners per compres que no han fet. Tots ells accepten que aquests càrrecs es fan després d’haver realitzat una compra a la nostra botiga col·laboradora. Després d’aquest estrany incident, truquem al nostre Equip Blau per investigar el cas. Després de revisar tant els registres com el codi web, van aconseguir trobar una biblioteca de tercers que va capturar la informació de les targetes bancàries, així com el seu CVV i data de venciment.

item.title: 🦻 [0x02] FTPando
item.description: Difficulty Hard Points 95 Category Multiple (Web Services, CVE's...) Description Això sí, aconseguir el token no serà gens fàcil. Hauràs d'utilitzatr diferents tècniques i encadenar-ne diverses juntes. Així que ja n’hi ha prou de xerrada per ara. El teu objectiu? La propera màquina: caixa1.hackrocks.com Bona sort! 🇺🇸 Getting the token won’t be easy. You’ll have to concatenate different techniques to get it. Let’s stop talking. Your objective? This machine: caixa1.
